location: Inside a chest at the back of an underground hall beneath Caelid Waypoint Ruins, reached via steps in the ruins' northwest corner leading down into a sarcophagus-lined hall.
tactics: Follow the Caelid Highway (western road through Caelid) south to Caelid Waypoint Ruins
Find the steps in the ruins' northwest corner leading underground
The hall is lined with sarcophagi and patrolled by Prawn Miners that can inflict Scarlet Rot — pull them one at a time rather than pushing in deep
The chest sits in a small side room at the back of the hall — no boss fight required
lore: Said to be forged from ore that fell from the sky, shaped to strike down creatures born of meteors. Its blade carries a strange, heavy quality — wielders can drive it into the ground to warp gravity around themselves, briefly drawing enemies inward like objects caught by a small falling star.

builds.name: Str/Int hybrid
builds.why: D Strength / E Dexterity / D Intelligence — a near-even Str/Int split gets the most from both its physical damage and its Gravitas skill
